capabilities.name: Transfer between agents
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface complete 2026-07-05: (1) skill surface — support_assign_conversation (db:chat_conversations) accepts agent_id for reassign; (2) admin UI — LiveSupportPage now has a Transfer control (Select next to Close) listing other support_agents with status dot + load (current/max), wired to a new transferConversation mutation in useSupportConversations (reassigns assigned_agent_id, keeps with_agent, increments target's counter and decrements the previous agent's). support_assign_conversation skill accepts agent_id for reassign
capabilities.notes: Was partial solely for the missing admin reassign control (skill existed). UI ships via Vercel on merge; targets are listed as 'Agent <id-prefix> · load' since support_agents carries no display name — joining a profile name is a cosmetic follow-up.

capabilities.name: Conversation history

capabilities.name: Agent availability/presence
capabilities.verify: LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): list_support_agents action=list returned the agent roster with status/current_conversations/max_conversations/last_seen_at — the availability picture for transfer decisions. UI side (useSupportPresence realtime + status dropdown) already shipped. useSupportPresence.tsx realtime presence + status dropdown in LiveSupportPage
capabilities.notes: Dual-surface complete. Two follow-ups filed from the live run (not blocking): (1) SECURITY — the generic-CRUD select * initially exposed voice_sip_password in the skill response; fixed same day with a per-table column mask in agent-execute (pending redeploy). (2) Data quality: an agent row shows current_conversations=24 vs max 5 — historical counter drift from paths that assigned without incrementing/decrementing symmetrically.
